# Contributing to Systematic Reviewer AI

First off, thanks for taking the time to contribute! 

## Development Setup
1. Fork and clone the repository.
2. Ensure you have Python 3.11+ installed.
3. Install dependencies using `pip install -e .[dev,test]`
4. Install pre-commit hooks: `pre-commit install`

## Pull Request Process
1. Ensure your code passes all linting (`pre-commit run --all-files`) and tests (`pytest`).
2. Add necessary Docstrings and Type hints (mypy should pass).
3. Update the README.md with details of changes to the interface, if applicable.
4. Issue a PR with a description explaining the motivation of the changes.

## License
By contributing, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under its MIT License.
